responseText:
## Summary: Rivian "ToughNut" Activity (Feb 27 – Mar 8, 2026)

Your Rivian R1S **was active** throughout the full 10-day period. Far from being false—this was a **busy road trip week** with cross-state travel, multiple DC fast charges, and significant charging activity.

### Key Highlights

- **Total distance:** 1,077.9 miles across 74 drives
- **Average efficiency:** 64% (very respectable for early March)
- **Total charging:** 669.7 kWh across 17 sessions
- **Charging cost:** $54.10 USD
- **Estimated gas savings:** $42.76
- **Idle/phantom drain:** 124.3 miles lost over the period

---

## Day-by-Day Narrative

### **Friday, Feb 27 — Departure from CT to VT**
- **118.4 miles driven** with 10 trips
- Evening: **DC fast charge in Bennington, VT** (27.8 kWh, $16.89, from 28% to 46% SOC)
- Later: **Level 2 charge in Cornwall, CT** twice (~8.6 kWh each)
- Then: **Overnight charge in Plymouth, VT** (41.2 kWh, from 25% to 53% SOC, 11+ hour session)

**Story:** You left Cornwall CT, drove north to Vermont, and spent the night charging at a Level 2 charger in Plymouth.

---

### **Saturday, Feb 28 — VT Road Trip Day**
- **70.8 miles driven** with 4 trips
- **Heavy charging day:** 3 sessions, 122.7 kWh total
  - **DC fast in North Canaan, CT** (34.1 kWh, $17.73, quick top-up from 14% to 34%)
  - **Overnight charge in Ludlow, VT** (53.7 kWh, 20-hour session, from 43% to 85%)
  
**Story:** You drove around VT with a stop in North Canaan for a quick fast charge, then settled in for a long overnight charge in Ludlow.

---

### **Sunday, Mar 1 — Return North to VT**
- **131.1 miles driven** with 5 trips
- **No charging costs** (free charging)
- **Overnight charge in Cornwall, CT** (83.3 kWh, 8+ hour session, from 19% to 85%)

**Story:** You drove back toward CT/Vermont area, spent the night recharging in Cornwall.

---

### **Monday, Mar 2 — Long Day, Heavy Charging**
- **160.7 miles driven** with 8 trips
- **3 charging sessions**, 195.3 kWh total, **$26.35 cost**
  - **DC fast in Dover, VT** (77.9 kWh, free, from 23% to 85%, 11+ hour session)

**Story:** Active driving day with a long DC fast charge stop in Dover—likely recharging before continuing north.

---

### **Tuesday, Mar 3 — Northern Vermont Exploration**
- **158.9 miles driven** with 9 trips
- **2 charging sessions**, 59.8 kWh, **no cost**
  - **DC fast in West Lebanon, NH** (58.1 kWh, free, from 33% to 74%)
  - **Level 2 in Dover, VT** (1.7 kWh, free)

**Story:** Exploring northern VT and NH with multiple stops and a free DC fast charge in West Lebanon.

---

### **Wednesday, Mar 4 — Major Road Trip Day**
- **206 miles driven** (highest single day!) with only 5 trips
- **2 DC fast charges**, both **free**, total 108.2 kWh
  - **Montpelier, VT:** 45 kWh (18% → 47%)
  - **Lebanon, NH:** 63.2 kWh (27% → 71%)
  - **Holyoke, MA:** 78.6 kWh (20% → 75%)

**Story:** This was your **biggest driving day** (206 miles) with strategic DC fast charges in Montpelier, Lebanon, and Holyoke—clearly a multi-state road trip through northern areas.

---

### **Thursday, Mar 5 — Return South, Heavy Charging**
- **96.2 miles driven** with 10 trips
- **2 charging sessions**, 118.2 kWh, **$4.10 cost**
  - **Cornwall, CT morning charge** (39.6 kWh, from 41% to 70%, ~4 hours)
  - **Cornwall, CT overnight charge** (31.3 kWh from 60% to 85%, overnight)

**Story:** You returned south to Cornwall CT area, charging twice in one day—once in morning, once overnight.

---

### **Friday, Mar 6 — Local Cornwall Area**
- **65.7 miles driven** with 13 trips (many short local trips)
- **2 charging sessions**, 33.8 kWh, **$3.49 cost**
  - **Cornwall, CT overnight** (31.3 kWh from 60% to 85%)
  - **Cornwall, CT short session** (2.5 kWh)

**Story:** Very active local driving around Cornwall—13 trips in one day suggests errands and local work. Charging happened at home.

---

### **Saturday, Mar 7 — Quiet Day**
- **10 miles driven** with only 4 trips (all within Cornwall area)
- **1 home charging session** (14.5 kWh, $1.50)

**Story:** Mostly stayed local with minimal driving. Short charge at home.

---

### **Sunday, Mar 8 — Your Day (Today)**
- **60.2 miles driven** with 6 trips (partial day as of now)
- **Multiple local trips:** Cornwall ↔ Sharon ↔ Litchfield
- Battery levels running lower today (drives ended at 18-25% SOC)

**Story:** Your day started with trips between Cornwall, Sharon, and Litchfield—likely returning home after weekend activities. Battery is getting low (18-25% at end of drives).

---

## Notable Patterns

1. **Road Trip Focus:** Feb 27 – Mar 4 was clearly a **northern New England/VT/NH/MA road trip** with multiple state crossings
2. **DC Fast Charging:** Heavy use of free DC fast chargers in Vermont (Montpelier, Dover, West Lebanon) and NH
3. **Home Base:** Cornwall, CT was your primary charging location (home)
4. **Efficiency:** Remarkably consistent 60-72% efficiency despite varied conditions
5. **Idle Loss:** Significant phantom drain (124.3 miles total)—sentry mode and climate may have been heavy

---

## Current Status (Mar 8)

Your Rivian ended its last drives today with battery between **18-25% SOC**—you'll likely need to charge soon if you plan to drive again. Last seen today: Cornwall area.

**Total for 10 days:** Over 1,000 miles of driving with a mix of long-distance adventure and local living!

transcript.text: look through my real data and summarize the 10 days of the rivians activity between february 27 and march 8 2026. if there were any notable trips, create a narrative of the time frame. today is mar 8 2026 and make sure that you include full 10 days, so if you don't have any drives and chargers in february its obviously false.
